description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the golang:latest Docker image and define a REPO_NAME variable set to gitlab.com/andreynech/dsched. Include a global before_script that updates apt, installs make and protobuf-compiler, creates the Go workspace directory, symlinks the project, changes into the workspace, prints the Go version, and fetches required Go packages with go get. Define two stages: test and build. In the test stage add a format job that runs go fmt, go vet, and go test -race on all non‑vendor packages. In the build stage add a compile job that builds the dscheduler and gateway binaries with go build -race -ldflags "-extldflags '-static'" -o dscheduler/dscheduler and -o gateway/gateway respectively, and publishes the resulting binaries as artifacts.
